name: execute_query
description: Execute SQL queries or database commands. Supports SELECT, JOIN, aggregate queries. With write mode enabled, also supports INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE operations.

query.description: SQL statement or database command to execute

params.description: Query parameters (optional, for parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection)

name: get_schema
description: Get database schema information including all table names, column names, data types, primary keys, and indexes. Call this before executing queries to understand the database structure.

forceRefresh.description: Force cache refresh (optional, default false). Set to true to get the latest database structure.

name: get_table_info
description: Get detailed information for a specified table including column definitions, indexes, and estimated row count.

tableName.description: Table name. Supports schema.table_name format (e.g. analytics.users). Queries default schema if no schema specified.

name: clear_cache
description: Clear the schema cache. Use when database structure changes (e.g. new tables added, columns modified).

name: get_enum_values
description: Get all unique values for a specified column. Useful for understanding possible values of status, type, category enum-like columns to generate accurate WHERE conditions.

tableName.description: Table name. Supports schema.table_name format (e.g. analytics.users).

columnName.description: Column name (typically status, type, category or other enum-like columns)

limit.description: Maximum number of values to return (optional, default 50, max 100)

includeCount.description: Whether to include occurrence count for each value (optional, default false)

name: get_sample_data
description: Get sample data from a table (with automatic data masking). Helps understand data formats like date formats, ID formats, and decimal precision. Sensitive data (phone, email, ID numbers) is automatically masked.

tableName.description: Table name. Supports schema.table_name format (e.g. analytics.users).

columns.description: Columns to view (optional, default all columns)

limit.description: Number of rows to return (optional, default 3, max 10)

name: connect_database
description: Connect to a database. Supports dynamic specification of database type and connection parameters without restarting the service. Supports: mysql, postgres, redis, oracle, sqlserver, mongodb, sqlite, and 10+ more database types.

allowWrite.description: Whether to allow write operations (default false)

permissionMode.description: Permission mode: safe (read-only), readwrite (no delete), or full (complete control)

name: disconnect_database
description: Disconnect from the current database. After disconnecting, connect_database must be called again to execute queries.

name: get_connection_status
description: Get the current database connection status. Returns connection state, database type, address, database name, and permission mode.
